idea-plugin.name: Search Finder
idea-plugin.description:
Search Finder is a powerful plugin that lets you search for any keyword, class name, or string across your entire project and navigate to each occurrence instantly. Perfect for unstructured codebases where files do not follow naming conventions. Find BottomSheet, AlertDialog, Snackbar, API keys, and more, even in files named Helper.kt or Utils.java.
  • Full-project content search with case-sensitive, regex, and whole-word modes
  • Double-click to navigate to the exact line
  • File-type badges color-coded for Kotlin, Java, XML, JSON, and more
  • Live filtering by file type and text
  • Stats dashboard with file-type breakdown
  • Right-click context menu with Navigate, Copy Line, Copy Path
  • CSV export for offline analysis
  • Full dark mode support

action.description: Open Search Finder to search for a key across the project
